name: llm_pipeline
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A horizontal pipeline flowing left to right with 5 connected stages shown as rounded rectangles: each stage glows progressively brighter from teal to electric blue to amber. Thin connecting arrows between stages. Represents the LLM processing pipeline from input to output. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 16:9 aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
